title: NLBootPlan
description: An NLBoot boot plan describing the ordered sequence of boot stages, artifact references, and verification policy for a target device.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

targetDeviceRef.description: URN reference to the physical device or asset this plan targets.

platform.description: Target platform type that determines bootloader selection and stage ordering.

status.description: Lifecycle state of the boot plan.

stages.description: Ordered list of boot stages that must be executed to complete the boot sequence.

artifactRef.description: URN reference to the stage artifact in the artifact cache or release set.

contentHash.description: Content-addressed digest of the stage artifact, e.g. "sha256:...".

verificationRequired.description: When true, the boot executor must verify the digest before executing this stage.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes for this stage.

bootReleaseSetRef.description: Optional URN reference to the BootReleaseSet that sourced the artifacts for this plan.

policyRef.description: Optional URN reference to the policy that governs execution of this boot plan.

activatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this plan was activated on the target device.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this boot plan was created.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes about this boot plan.
